cards.afterText: Deal damage to Triceratops equal to the damage dealt.
cards.basicText: This card's effects cannot be canceled.
cards.duringText: Add +1 to this card's value for every space Triceratops moved this turn.
cards.title: UNSTOPPABLE CHARGE

cards.duringText: Ignore the value of your opponent's card.
cards.title: 15,000 POUNDS OF MUSCLE

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, draw 2 cards. If you lost the combat, your opponent draws 2 cards.
cards.title: FATAL STRUGGLE

cards.duringText: Add the BOOST value of the top card of your discard pile to this card's value.
cards.title: PROTECTION OF THE HERD

cards.afterText: Deal 2 damage to the opposing fighter if they are within range of the Triceratops.
cards.title: PREY VERSUS PREDATOR

cards.basicText: Move Triceratops up to 4 spaces. You may move through opposing fighters. Move each fighter you moved through up to 1 space and deal them 1 damage.
cards.title: STAMPEDE

cards.basicText:
Choose 1. If there are no opposing fighters in Triceratops' zone, you may do both.
> Triceratops recovers 3 health.
> Draw 2 cards.
cards.title: HERBIVOROUS DINOSAURS

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, deal 1 damage to each opposing fighter in Triceratops' zone.
cards.title: THRASH

cards.afterText: Move your fighter up to 3 spaces.
cards.title: DASH

cards.duringText: If your fighter started this turn in a different space, this card's value is 5 instead.
cards.title: MOMENTOUS SHIFT

cards.immediateText: If you are adjacent to the opposing fighter, they cannot leave their space for the rest of the turn.
cards.title: IMPALED BY THE HORNS

hero.name: TRICERATOPS
hero.specialAbility:
Triceratops is a large fighter. She can attack up to 2 spaces away.

If Triceratops is adjacent to the opposing fighter, add +1 to the value of all Triceratops' attacks.
hero.quote: Horns, frill, and a very short temper — a LARGE fighter who can gore from two spaces away but hits hardest nose-to-nose.

sidekick.name: Sidekick
sidekick.quote:
"She was my favorite when I was a kid. Now I see her, she's the most beautiful thing I ever saw."                 
                                               —Alan Grant

name: Triceratops (Jurassic)
note:
Triceratops is a Large Fighter. (She can attack up to 2 spaces away.)
--------------------
Version 2.3 - Remove the scheme card "Closer than the she appears" as observed not thematic to the hero; Change the Stampede atk card to a scheme card; Added the Fatal Struggle atk card as a new attack card with 3 copies for drawing power and also thematic to the Trike. Increase the BOOST value of Momentous Shift versatile card from 1 to 2. Wording update on special ability just added She can attack up to 2 spaces away and the removed ability name. Slight buff on Herbivorous Dinosaurs scheme, adding optional choice in doing both draw card and health recovery effect. Change image address of the card back art and card arts.
--------------------
My First custom character. Inspired on Jurassic Universe's Triceratops. Disclaimer on the fanart and images not my property, just edited them at photopea.com
